channel.title: Hawaii Revised Statutes (unofficial) — updates
channel.description: Updates to the unofficial searchable Hawaii Revised Statutes: data refreshes, new acts, and legislative-history changes.

item.title: Legislative history & signing dates added
item.description: Every statute now shows the Acts that enacted or amended it, with bill numbers, effective dates, and Governor signing dates (1999–2025), plus clickable citations.

item.title: Site launched
item.description: An unofficial, searchable copy of the full Hawaii Revised Statutes — 14 volumes, 1,108 chapters, 19,840 sections — published. Statute text retrieved June 2026.
